title: Evals File
description: Schema for Claude Code skill evaluation files

skill_name.description: Name of the plugin or skill being evaluated

id.description: Unique identifier for this eval (e.g. T1, B2, JJ-T1)

type.description: Eval category: triggering (skill activation), behavioral (skill behavior), negative (non-activation)

skill.description: Skill under test for behavioral evals

prompt.description: User prompt or input to evaluate

context.description: Optional environmental context (e.g. repo state, directory contents)

expected_skill.description: Skill expected to be triggered; null if none should trigger

assertions.description: List of assertions to verify the eval

description.description: Human-readable description of what is being asserted

type.description: Assertion mechanism: skill_triggered/skill_not_triggered (skill activation), command_invoked (slash command), contains/not_contains (output text match), manual (human review required)

check.description: Value to check: skill name, command name, text to match, or manual verification instructions
